title: Red Hat Security Advisory: grafana security update
overview:
An update for grafana is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS (v.9.6)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: grafana security update

An update for grafana is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for grafana is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_6.src.rpm
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
grafana-debuginfo-10.2.6-17.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
grafana-debugsource-10.2.6-17.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_6.s390x.rpm
grafana-debuginfo-10.2.6-17.el9_6.s390x.rpm
grafana-debugsource-10.2.6-17.el9_6.s390x.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_6.s390x.rpm
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_6.ppc64le.rpm
grafana-debuginfo-10.2.6-17.el9_6.ppc64le.rpm
grafana-debugsource-10.2.6-17.el9_6.ppc64le.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_6.ppc64le.rpm
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_6.aarch64.rpm
grafana-debuginfo-10.2.6-17.el9_6.aarch64.rpm
grafana-debugsource-10.2.6-17.el9_6.aarch64.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_6.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2026-21721: The dashboard permissions API does not verify the target dashboard scope and only checks the dashboards.permissions:* action. As a result, a user who has permission management rights on one dashboard can read and modify permissions on other dashboards. This is an organization‑internal privilege escalation.
